name: Constellation Energy Corporation
type: Nuclear Power Generation / Largest US Fleet

investment_theses.company_type: Nuclear Power Generation / Largest US Fleet

content: Constellation Energy Corporation is the largest producer of carbon-free energy in the United States and a leading supplier of energy products and services. Headquartered in Baltimore, the company operates the nation's largest fleet of nuclear power plants, providing reliable, emission-free electricity to millions of homes and businesses. Constellation is a critical player in the transition to a clean energy economy, leveraging its diverse generation portfolio—including hydro, wind, and solar—to help customers meet their sustainability goals while maintaining grid reliability and energy security across the country.
